name: Gooseworks
description: Gooseworks 是一家由 YC 孵化的 AI 原生服务公司，专注于构建无需人工介入即可直接交付结果的 AI 服务，而非仅作为辅助工具的 Copilot。
description_en: Gooseworks is a YC‑backed AI‑native service company building AI services that deliver finished work without human involvement, not just Copilot‑style assistants.
why_matters: Gooseworks 代表了从 Copilot 到 AI 原生服务的范式转变，即企业直接购买服务而非软件，这与 YC 2026 年 AI 服务类别的重点高度一致，适合在 B2B 服务自动化赛道中快速验证商业模式。
why_matters_en: Gooseworks exemplifies the shift from Copilot to AI‑native services, where companies buy the service rather than the software, aligning closely with YC’s 2026 focus on AI‑native service companies and enabling rapid business‑model validation in B2B service automation.
latest_news: 2026-04: Gooseworks 在 YC W23 批次中活跃招聘，表明其正处于早期增长阶段，正在扩展团队以支持产品迭代和客户交付。
latest_news_en: 2026-04: Gooseworks is actively hiring from its YC W23 batch, indicating it is in an early growth phase and expanding its team to support product iteration and customer delivery.

name: Infisical
description: Infisical 是一家 YC 支持的开发者安全与密钥管理平台，利用 AI 增强密钥生命周期管理和访问控制，帮助团队在多云和 AI 工作流中安全地管理敏感凭证。
description_en: Infisical is a YC‑backed developer security and secrets management platform that uses AI to enhance key lifecycle management and access control, helping teams securely manage sensitive credentials across multi‑cloud and AI workflows.
why_matters: Infisical 将 AI 应用于密钥和凭证管理，解决了 AI 服务和多云环境中日益复杂的权限与安全问题，符合 2026 年 AI 安全与 agentic 安全的趋势，具有明确的 B2B 开发者市场定位。
why_matters_en: Infisical applies AI to secrets and key management, addressing the growing complexity of permissions and security in AI services and multi‑cloud environments, aligning with 2026 trends in AI security and agentic security and offering a clear B2B developer‑focused market.
latest_news: 2026-04: Infisical 在 YC W23 批次中招聘全栈工程师，表明其正在扩展平台功能以支持更多 AI 和云原生工作流。
latest_news_en: 2026-04: Infisical is hiring full‑stack engineers from its YC W23 batch, indicating it is expanding platform capabilities to support more AI and cloud‑native workflows.
